---
name: Feature or improvement
about: Propose a user-facing feature, API contract, or technical improvement
title: "[Area] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem and context

<!-- Who is affected, what happens today, and why does it matter? -->

## User or system outcome

<!-- Describe the observable result, not only classes or files to create. -->

## Scope

-

## Out of scope

-

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ]
- [ ] Backward compatibility is preserved or an approved breaking change is documented.

## API and documentation

<!-- Include typed request/response/error contracts, OpenAPI group, examples, and api-summary discoverability when applicable. -->

## Security and privacy

<!-- Authentication, permissions, ownership, visibility, negative cases, rate limits, PII, uploads, SSRF, audit needs. -->

## Data and compatibility

<!-- Migrations, constraints, indexes, existing data/clients, rollback or rollout. -->

## Test expectations

<!-- Unit, MVC/contract, repository, integration, and external-system fake/stub coverage. -->

## Dependencies and related work

<!-- Blocking issues, blocked issues, and frontend counterpart. -->

## Definition of done

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are satisfied.
- [ ] Appropriate tests pass.
- [ ] Security, compatibility, OpenAPI, and documentation are reviewed.
- [ ] Work is committed locally only when requested; nothing is pushed by an agent.
